headline: Sentinel Capital Partners to Sell NSI Industries
summary: Sentinel Capital Partners, a private equity firm that invests in promising midmarket companies, today announced it has signed a definitive agreement to sell NSI Industries, a leading manufacturer and supplier of branded electrical products, to Hubbell Incorporated (NYSE: HUBB) for $3.0 billion.
